payload.goal: TODO at backend/core/ouroboros/governance/verify_gate.py:16: verify gate scan — validate TodoScanner trigger-tag e2e (task #63)

Execute a complete architectural mapping of the Trinity consciousness substrate. Identify every point of coupling between the episodic memory layer (memory_engine), the SemanticGuardian, and the OperationLedger. Do not mutate any code. Map the call graphs and data structures, and output a detailed gap analysis. This task is a pure-exploration discovery across three distinct subsystems (backend/core/ouroboros/consciousness/memory_engine.py, backend/core/ouroboros/governance/semantic_guardian.py, backend/core/ouroboros/governance/ledger.py) that have no shared file paths. The scope is deliberately broader than any single exploration round's context budget — you should dispatch parallel exploration subagents across the three scope boundaries (consciousness/, governance/semantic_guardian, governance/ledger) so each subsystem's call graph, data structures, and coupling surface can be mapped independently without polluting your main context. Return a structured gap analysis covering: (1) every call that crosses subsystem boundaries, (2) every shared data structure or contract, (3) every implicit coupling (event channels, ledger reads, memory lookups), (4) gaps where coupling exists but is undocumented, and (5) gaps where the subsystems should be coupled but aren't. Do NOT write any source files. Do NOT run any tests. This is a read-only architectural cartography task.
Python 3.9.6 is PAST end-of-life (EOL: 2025-10). No security patches. Upgrade required.
